creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm seeing something similar. 

I beleieve the bug is that we run 10.2 and want to get to 11.0. 

Building 11.0 on 10.3 works fine.


include -internal-isystem /usr/include/c++/v1 -O2 -Wno-c++11-extensions -std=c++11 -fdeprecated-macro -fdebug-compilation-dir /usr/obj/usr/src/tmp/usr/src/lib/clang/libclangcodegen -ferror-limit 19 -fmessage-length 178 -mstackrealign -fno-rtti -fobjc-runtime=gnustep -fdiagnostics-show-option -fcolor-diagnostics -vectorize-loops -vectorize-slp -o CGBlocks.o -x c++ /usr/src/lib/clang/libclangcodegen/../../../contrib/llvm/tools/clang/lib/CodeGen/CGBlocks.cpp
